---
title: "deploy_job.sh"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-primprod.html)

Builds, deploys, and schedules the MH1 primary productivity Cloud Run job.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.bash}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-primprod/deploy_job.sh >}}
```

:::
